question: Ethereum all time high in April?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for ETHUSDT between 01 Apr '25 00:00 and 30 Apr '25 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final “high” price that is higher than any previous Binance 1 minute candle's "high" price on any prior date. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the ETHUSDT "high" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT with “1m” and “Candles” selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETHUSDT, not according to other sources or spot market
